data_sources.VIX_spot: FRED VIXCLS (CBOE VIX official daily close)
data_sources.VIX3M_proxy: Morningstar MCP F00000LI7D (ProShares VIX Mid-Term Futures ETF, NOT ^VIX3M index itself)

caveats: FRED VIXCLS has data up to 2026-07-15 only (2026-07-16 not yet published as of pull time)
Morningstar MCP does not support ^VIX3M ticker (the actual CBOE index)
VIX3M_proxy uses ProShares VIXM ETF price as a substitute; the historical correlation is high but not 1:1
VIXM ETF price (mid-teens range) is not the same scale as ^VIX3M index (typically slightly higher than spot VIX)
For production use, replace VIX3M_proxy with ^VIX3M data from CBOE/FRED when available
